svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="drawio"> <diagram id="ancient-vs-ai" name="古法 vs AI 驱动学习"> <mxGraphModel dx="-464" dy="-160" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="540" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;align=center;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#dc2626" value="古法学习" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="60" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="old1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14" value="拍脑袋选题" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="old2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14" value="看资料/教程" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="60" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="old3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14" value="写 demo" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="60" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="old4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fee2e2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14" value="忘掉了" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="60" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="old1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2" target="old2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="old2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2" target="old3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="old4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1" target="old1" value="×"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="30" y="375" /> <mxPoint x="30" y="105" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="divider" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="480" y="60" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="500" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="title2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;align=center;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#2563eb" value="AI 驱动学习" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="200" x="620" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="new1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14" value="市场扫描" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="620" y="80" as="geometry" value="系统学习" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="620" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="new4" parent="1"
